---
title: "Bayesian Statistical Theory and Computation"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 2"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Bayesian Statistical Theory and Computation

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 2

Bayesian inference is the universal framework for learning from data under uncertainty. This course covers the full theory from prior specification through posterior computation and model comparison.

## Table of Contents

1. Foundations of Bayesian Inference
2. Prior Specification
3. Conjugate and Analytical Solutions
4. Markov Chain Monte Carlo: Theory
5. Hamiltonian Monte Carlo and Modern Samplers
6. Variational Inference
7. Hierarchical and Multilevel Models
8. Model Comparison and Selection
9. Bayesian Nonparametrics
10. Approximate Bayesian Computation and Simulation-Based Inference

---

## Chapter 1: Foundations of Bayesian Inference

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Prior Specification

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Conjugate and Analytical Solutions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Markov Chain Monte Carlo: Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo and Modern Samplers

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Variational Inference

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Hierarchical and Multilevel Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Model Comparison and Selection

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 9: Bayesian Nonparametrics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 10: Approximate Bayesian Computation and Simulation-Based Inference

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
